entities.name: PLANT BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: Diversity of plant species used to sustainably enhance food security

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: Diversity of microbial species used to sustainably enhance food security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: WORLD POPULATION
entities.description: The total number of humans globally, projected to reach 9 billion by 2050

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations experiencing significant population growth and high rates of chronic hunger

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Continent expected to experience more than half of global population growth

entities.name: CHRONIC HUNGER
entities.description: A state of long-term food insufficiency affecting one in nine people globally

entities.name: GLOBAL CHANGES
entities.description: Large-scale environmental or climatic shifts that negatively impact agriculture

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The agricultural process of growing crops for food and livelihoods

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life for people in rural communities

entities.name: RURAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Populations living in non-urban areas where food security and livelihoods are critical

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The state of being susceptible to the negative impacts of global changes and food insecurity

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of communities to recover from and adapt to environmental or economic shocks

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality and productivity of land
